Podo..personality: A sluggish, torpid constitution prone to periodic crises — alternating between states of overwhelming physical discharge and mental stagnation. The Podophyllum type is restless and fidgety, unable to sit still, yet deeply fatigued in mind and body.
Podo..mental_state: The mind is easily fatigued with a torpid, fluctuating quality mirroring the disordered liver. There is a tendency toward fixed delusions — believing one has organic disease of the heart or liver, that the illness will become chronic, or that one has sinned beyond redemption. Mental excitement or overexertion readily triggers physical crises.
Podo..emotional_pattern: Dominated by deep depression, melancholia, and profound dejection — everything appears dark with no light visible. There is a pervasive sense of impending doom, a feeling that things will only worsen. An overwhelming 'all-gone' emptiness pervades both body and spirit, as if everything internal is dragging downward and falling away.
